title: Bento Box
body:
This is a bento box with a 3x6 storage capacity, exclusively for food items.

Right-clicking it (while held in hand) will allow you to instantly consume the food item in its topmost-left slot, provided your hunger bar is not full.

Sneak-right-clicking (Shift + Right-click) will open the bento box’s inventory GUI, revealing its internal storage.

(If the Curios API mod is installed, the bento box can be placed in an accessory slot.)

(Future plans include hotkey-triggered eating and automatic feeding functionality.)

这是拥有3x6存储空间的便当盒，只能存储食物；
右键且饥饿值未满时，右键可以吃下便当盒内最靠前（左上）的食物；
潜行右键时，将会打开便当盒，显示其中的空间。
（如果下载了curious api模组，便当盒可以放在饰品栏内；）
（未来计划是可以使用快捷键食用食物和自动喂食等）
